Notification.subject: Welcome to the portal
Notification.body: Welcome Joe. Your portal account is ready.

ApiCatalogEntry.name: Claims Adjudication API
ApiCatalogEntry.description: Search claim status, adjudication history, and remittance outcomes across payer workflows.

ApiCatalogEntry.name: Pharmacy Benefits API
ApiCatalogEntry.description: Retrieve formulary, benefit, and prior authorization context for pharmacy transactions.

ApiCatalogEntry.name: Eligibility Verification API
ApiCatalogEntry.description: Validate member coverage, accumulators, and eligibility windows before service delivery.

ApiCatalogEntry.name: Clinical Data Exchange API
ApiCatalogEntry.description: Exchange encounter summaries, lab snapshots, and care events for clinical workflows and downstream analytics.

ApiCatalogEntry.name: Prior Authorization Hub API
ApiCatalogEntry.description: Coordinate prior authorization intake, decisioning, and utilization review timelines across payer and provider touchpoints.

Role.name: Provider
Role.description: Provider portal access role for practice workflows.

Role.name: Employer Group Admin
Role.description: Employer group admin role for enrollment and billing administration.

Role.name: Broker
Role.description: Broker role for enrollment and billing support workflows.

Permission.name: View Member Portal
Permission.description: Allows access to member-facing portal experiences.

Permission.name: View Provider Portal
Permission.description: Allows access to provider-facing portal experiences.

Permission.name: Manage Users
Permission.description: Allows creating and updating user records.

Permission.name: View Billing and Enrollment
Permission.description: Allows access to billing and enrollment experiences.

Permission.name: Manage Billing and Enrollment
Permission.description: Allows operational and administrative updates in billing and enrollment.

Permission.name: Manage Admin
Permission.description: Allows access to administrative configuration workflows.
